posts.author: jennyvaz (Jenny Vaz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - when integrating with slack, it picks up another account instead and on other occasions, it tells me that there’s an error trying to connect.

Secondly, I don’t want the users on the slack channel to access Monday (there’s a prompt with every notification). Is there a way to disable this?

Anyone had breakthroughs?
